_publications._publicationTitle: Genomic imbalance of HMMR/RHAMM regulates the sensitivity and response of malignant peripheral nerve sheath tumour cells to aurora kinase inhibition.

_contextSnippet: The 2885 cell-line resisted MLN8237 treatment and required 400-725 fold higher concentrations to inhibit 50% of cellular growth (IC-50), which is consistent with the negligible expression of AURKA in this cell-line
details: Required 400-725 fold higher MLN8237 concentrations to inhibit 50% of cellular growth (IC-50), consistent with negligible AURKA expression
